mandatory_final_invariants.contract: backend result.weights are decimals and must sum to 1.0 +/- 1e-6 for every compliant result
frontend displayed/applied weights are percentages and must sum to 100.0 +/- display tolerance
no returned or displayed weight may be negative
no returned metric, weight, exposure, or constraint total may be NaN or Infinity
every used_asset must have an explicit numeric weight; every positive weight must belong to used_assets or be marked missing/zeroed
bucket, group, geo, lock, max_weight, min_weight, vol_band, and suitability constraints are recalculated after solver and fallback
fallback_non_compliant must not be treated as an applicable portfolio
missing exposure is REVIEW/BLOCKED for restrictive profiles and is never interpreted as 0 percent equity without an explicit warning

final_status_contract.meaning: Solver succeeded and all post-solver invariants/constraints pass.
Solver succeeded and hard invariants pass, but non-critical warnings or fallback source diagnostics exist.
Fallback path used, all hard invariants and required constraints pass, and fallback reason is explicit.
Fallback path used but at least one hard invariant or required constraint failed postcheck.
Precheck or postcheck proves the requested constraints are mathematically impossible.
History, exposure, mu, covariance, or finite-data requirements are insufficient.
Unexpected exception or invalid input contract.

next_recommended_block: BDB-OPT-2 should implement tests only for P0 invariants, still no runtime production behavior change until tests define the safety contract.
